runners.formComment: Was out of placings last time (30.63) at The Meadows in a Grade 6, finishing sixth and beaten 5 lengths. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed five times. Others appear better placed.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced wide turning into back straight.
Turned head inwards and visibly eased turning into home straight.

runners.formComment: Last start finished 3rd over 450m at Shepparton beaten 3.5 lengths (25.61) behind Wanbi in a Mix 6/7 on April 6. Comes out of a hot form race. Worth following up.

runners.formComment: Has only been in the placings once from 10 starts. Last raced when seventh over 390m at this track two-and-a-half weeks ago. Others better.

runners.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 450m. Last start finished 3rd over 460m at Geelong beaten 8 lengths (26.31) behind Little Flower in a Rank Limit - Grade 5 on April 7. More than capable and ready to find best form.

runners.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at The Meadows (44.27) in a Restricted WIN, finishing a 14 length seventh. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed three times. Looks suited and should go close.
